text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian is running in the spring Tenno Sho too?! YES!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It may not be appropriate for me to say this,
being here for work and all, but I want Narita
Brian to win it!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Right? I'm totally with you there! I want her to
keep winning so I can see her become the
absolute strongest racer out there!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Biwa Hayahide? You're Biwa Hayahide,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes, well...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I'm a huge fan! Are you here to root for
your sister?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I suppose you could say that.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Then let's cheer her on together! It's a real shame
about your injury...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hey! It's rude to bring up an injury like that, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, it's all right, considering it's true. That's
precisely the reason I'm not competing in this
race.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I'm sure your sister can bring in a win for
you! And hopefully that'll help ease some of your
regret.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: My regret...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is where racers compete for
the venerable Spring Shield. And Narita Brian
looks—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No matter who I'm facing, it doesn't change what
I have to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, Japan's best stayer, Mejiro
McQueen, and Twin Crown Champion Mihono
Bourbon are racing today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to look at me so pleadingly. I'm
going to win regardless.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You got this, McQueen!
You can do it, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: They sure are riled up out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you've finally decided to grace us with your
presence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a superb race today. One where none
of us have any regrets.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sounds good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have confirmed our shared status—"strong
desire for victory."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analysis indicates that methods of achieving said
victory may differ, but the inability to accept
defeat is the same.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The both of you have continued to prove
yourselves by growing stronger through every
race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So now it's my turn to prove myself against you
two.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: For the sake of suppressing this itch—this fire!
